title: Prestige TV Key Art Remix
description: A Prompt Atlas theme for premium streaming ensemble key art, where alternate fictional casts must preserve hierarchy, distance, gaze, and prestige-drama polish.

en.title: Prestige TV Key Art Remix
en.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for premium streaming ensemble key art, where alternate fictional casts must preserve hierarchy, distance, gaze, and prestige-drama polish.

zh-CN.title: 精品剧集主视觉换阵容
zh-CN.description: 测试把不同虚构阵容放进流媒体精品剧集主视觉语法时,是否仍能保持角色层级、距离关系、视线张力和大奖季海报质感。
